items.title: Salesforce, Inc. (CRM): A Bull Case Theory
items.description: We came across a bullish thesis on Salesforce, Inc. on LongYield’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CRM. Salesforce, Inc.’s share was trading at $236.58 as of October 15th. CRM’s trailing and forward P/E were 34.72 and 18.87 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Salesforce, the leading cloud-based CRM provider, is evolving its business […]

items.title: Why Salesforce.com (CRM) Dipped More Than Broader Market Today

items.title: Salesforce (CRM): Assessing Valuation After Recent 10% Share Price Gain
items.description: Salesforce (CRM) shares have caught the attention of traders recently, following modest gains of nearly 10% over the past week. This move comes after a period of volatility for the stock, as investors weigh its recent performance against broader market trends. See our latest analysis for Salesforce. The recent jump in Salesforce’s share price follows a tough year, with a 20.34% drop year-to-date. That said, momentum is starting to shift, as this week’s nearly 10% share price return hints at...
